title: Fix CommandCenterUI ProjectUpdater open/status runtime
description: Operator reported that CommandCenterUI's ProjectUpdater card says offline and clicking Open ProjectUpdater does nothing. Fix the released TASK-135 integration so the live app can read ProjectUpdater status and open the standalone ProjectUpdater app reliably from the localhost UI without relying on browser-permitted file:// navigation.
acceptance_criteria: Live CommandCenterUI /api/project-updater/status returns 200 with ProjectUpdater app_exists true
Open ProjectUpdater uses a same-origin local backend action or otherwise works from CommandCenterUI without relying on blocked file:// navigation
Security boundary remains fixed-path localhost-only: no user-supplied path launch and no browser localStorage scraping
Validation covers server syntax, JS syntax, endpoint behavior, and MAP validators
